Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jacob Harker of Law Offices of Jacob Harker telephone number 415-624-7602 for Petitioner Mary O'Shea.
Reno Fernandez of MacDonald Fernandez LLP telephone number 209-549-7949 for Respondent Real Bright Media, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling RESPONDENT REAL BRIGHT MEDIA INC.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion For Court To Take Jurisdiction Of Voluntary Winding Up And Dissolution Of Real Bright Media Inc
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jacob Harker of Law Offices of Jacob Harker telephone number 415-624-7602 for Petitioner Mary O'Shea.
Reno Fernandez of MacDonald Fernandez LLP telephone number 209-549-7949 for Respondent Real Bright Media, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS MATT BARRETT, HEATHER BYRNES, FENWICK CRECY, CYNTHIA HECKER, MARY O'SHEA, MARGIE BARR, DANIEL BARRETT, BRIAN GREGOR, ERIK HELLMAN, LINDA HERNANDEZ, CAROLE MEINER and NICOLE MORTON'S Motion For Court To Take Jurisdiction Of Voluntary Winding Up And Dissolution Of Real Bright Media Inc is denied. The court lacks jurisdiction over the winding up of RBM since that winding up has been completed and RBM has been dissolved. The court expresses no views whether there were any improprieties in the actions that led up to and resulted in the winding up and dissolution of RBM. If there were such improprieties, petitioners may have remedies other than this petition to seek relief from those improprieties. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
